title: Validation Evidence
description: Per-scope record of which validation gates have passed against which commit SHA. Written by lib/validation-evidence.js under the per-Epic temp tree at temp/run-<id>/validation-evidence.json (Epic-scoped) or temp/run-<id>/stories/story-<storyId>/validation-evidence.json (Story-scoped). Standalone Stories (no parent Epic) use a storyId-anchored keyspace at temp/standalone/stories/story-<storyId>/validation-evidence.json. All paths are gitignored via temp/. Consumed by close-validation, epic-code-review, the acceptance self-eval critic, and /deliver Phase 3 (close-validation) to skip identical re-runs against an already-validated tree. The `storyId` field carries the scope id and equals the epic id for Epic-scoped records.

storyId.description: GitHub Issue number of the Story this evidence file belongs to.

schemaVersion.description: Evidence-record schema version. Bumped on breaking changes to the record shape.

records.description: One record per gate that has passed. Each subsequent successful run replaces the prior record for that gate.

gateName.description: Stable gate identifier. Closed enum — additions require a schema bump.

commitSha.description: Output of `git rev-parse HEAD` at the moment the gate passed.

commandConfigHash.description: sha256 of the canonical JSON of { cmd, args, cwd } used to invoke the gate. Skip is gated on exact-match with the current invocation.

exitCode.description: Exit code recorded for the passing run. Always 0 today; reserved for future non-zero soft-pass semantics.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the passing run, in milliseconds. Optional.

inputFingerprint.description: Optional sha256 (or other stable digest) of the byte-identical inputs the gate consumed. When present, shouldSkip() will match on this even if the commit SHA has moved — letting docs-only or whitespace-only commits skip an unchanged gate.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp recorded when the gate passed.
